perturbation.original_text: The execution and filing of this agreement shall not be construed as an admission that the below-named parties are a group or have acted as a group.
perturbation.changed_text: The execution and filing of this agreement shall be construed as an admission that the below-named parties are a group.
perturbation.explanation: This introduces an internal contradiction by stating that filing the agreement *is* an admission of acting as a group, directly opposing the previous statement that it *is not* an admission of such. This contradiction creates uncertainty regarding the legal implications of signing the agreement, especially related to group liability.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The execution and filing of this agreement shall be construed as an admission that the below-named parties are a group.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the contradicted text. The original text stated that filing the agreement is *not* an admission, while both the changed text and the contradicted text state it *is* an admission. This creates a clear and unambiguous contradiction within the agreement concerning the legal implications of its execution.
